title: Parent item name included in the bell notification from a sub-item
excerpt:
We generate alot of sub-items via automations which means on a single board we end up with alot of sub-items that have the same name. 
When i receive a bell notification because i am mentioned in an update on a sub-item …

posts.author: chrisflavours (Chris Watts)
posts.cookedHtml:
We generate alot of sub-items via automations which means on a single board we end up with alot of sub-items that have the same name.

When i receive a bell notification because i am mentioned in an update on a sub-item its difficult for me to identify the parent item without clicking through to it from the notification.

I would like to be able to identify the parent item without clicking though to it on the notification because this help me determine the urgency of the tag.

It would be great if teh bell notification mentioned the name of the parent item as well as the name of the sub-item.
